subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance! At this hour G. A. K., being present, made mention of thee; whereupon We made mention of thee through that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه در این حین غ ا ک حاضر ذکر شما را نمود ذکرناک بما
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
